blockingIssues.description: Tautological test assertion at crates/swell-daemon/src/commands.rs:2141 — `assert!(mcp_health.is_empty() || !mcp_health.is_empty())` always evaluates to true regardless of actual value. The comment says 'Real data from orchestrator' but the assertion doesn't verify this. Original test had `assert!(mcp_health.contains_key("_status"))` which was replaced with a tautology. This provides zero verification that real MCP health data is being returned.

Test failure: test_five_layer_precedence_ordering panics at crates/swell-core/src/config.rs:552:42 with 'called `Option::unwrap()` on a `None` value'. This is a pre-existing test failure unrelated to the features being reviewed, but it blocks the milestone.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update swell-orchestrator/AGENTS.md Orchestrator struct documentation to include the mcp_manager field and get_mcp_health() method in the Public API section. The struct now has 6 fields but docs show 5.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature review for followup-m11-daemon-mcp-health-wiring found Orchestrator struct docs don't reflect current implementation.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document secret scanner testing conventions in swell-tools/AGENTS.md: tests requiring external tools (gitleaks/ggshield) should either document the requirement or use mocks. The skip pattern used is reasonable but not documented.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Feature review for followup-m12-secret-scanning-production-wiring noted tests skip when scanner not installed, and this convention is not documented.
